english translation text:
Raise your head from Sajdah
and go back into Sajdah
In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: أَعُوذُ بِنُورِ وَجْهِكَ الَّذِي أَضَاءَتْ لَهُ السَّمَاوَاتُ وَالأَرَضُونَ
english translation text: I seek the protection of the light of Your Face that has lit the heavens and the earth
and has made active all the affairs of the past and the coming generations
and against withdrawing the good health that You have granted me
and against the vanishing of Your bounties.
Oh Allah: (please) grant me a heart that is pious and pure,
and is neither atheist nor unhappy.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
